summary: Comprehensive testing of Pilates Reformer Studio app completed. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with proper Bosnian language implementation. Phone auth flow, Google OAuth, and all main pages working. Minor overlay issue preventing some navigation clicks.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 when user doesn't exist (expected behavior for new users)
minor_issues.impact: None - this is correct flow directing to registration

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay prevents clicking on Paketi and Profil tabs
ui_bugs.workaround: Direct navigation to pages works fine

passed_tests: Phone auth flow with OTP (mock 123456) working
Google OAuth redirects to auth.emergentagent.com correctly
Login page loads with proper Bosnian text and styling
Home page shows welcome card, memberships, trainings, contact info
Schedule page with week calendar and booking functionality
Packages page with 4 membership packages and purchase buttons
Profile page with user info and logout functionality
All text properly displayed in Bosnian language
Terms of Service and Privacy Policy pages accessible
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix overlay z-index issue: The 'Made with Emergent' badge is intercepting pointer events on bottom navigation. Add CSS rule to prevent this overlay from blocking navigation clicks.
